## Group A

### A1.01 — XCE clears XH/YH

Provenance: **Documented** (SNESdev Errata, 65C816 section). Kind: scored.

| Code | Byte | Meaning |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | `$02` | XH not cleared by entering emulation mode |
| 2 | `$04` | YH not cleared by entering emulation mode |

### A1.02 — SEP #$10 clears XH/YH

Provenance: **Documented** (SNESdev Errata, 65C816 section). Kind: scored.

| Code | Byte | Meaning |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | `$02` | XH survived SEP #$10 (must be cleared, not masked) |
| 2 | `$04` | YH survived SEP #$10 (must be cleared, not masked) |

Provenance: **Documented** (6502.org 65c816opcodes; WDC datasheet). Kind: scored.

| Code | Byte | Meaning |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | `$02` | SH not forced to $01 on entering emulation mode |

|---|---|---|

Provenance: **Documented** (6502.org 65c816opcodes). Kind: scored.

|---|---|---|

### A2.01 — d,X never crosses bank

Provenance: **Documented** (superfamicom.org 65816 reference, worked example). Kind: scored.

| Code | Byte | Meaning |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | `$02` | d,X crossed into bank $01 instead of wrapping within bank $00 |

Provenance: **Documented** (superfamicom.org 65816 reference). Kind: scored.

| Code | Byte | Meaning |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | `$02` | emulation DL=$00 did not page-wrap the direct-page index |

Provenance: **Documented** (superfamicom.org 65816 reference). Kind: scored.

| Code | Byte | Meaning |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | `$02` | emulation DL!=$00 wrongly page-wrapped the direct-page index |

### A2.04 — Native always carries

Provenance: **Documented** (superfamicom.org 65816 reference). Kind: scored.

| Code | Byte | Meaning |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | `$02` | native mode page-wrapped the direct-page index (it must carry) |

### A2.05 — [dp] never page-wraps

Provenance: **Documented** (superfamicom.org 65816 reference; WDC datasheet). Kind: scored.

| Code | Byte | Meaning |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | `$02` | [dp] pointer fetch page-wrapped (new modes must not) |

### A3.01 — E=1 stack wraps pg1

Provenance: **Documented** (WDC datasheet; 6502.org 65c816opcodes). Kind: scored.

| Code | Byte | Meaning |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | `$02` | emulation stack did not wrap within page 1 |
| 2 | `$04` | PHA did not write the byte at $0100 |

### A3.02 — PEA escapes page 1

Provenance: **Documented** (WDC datasheet; hardware-confirmed per superfamicom.org). Kind: scored.

| Code | Byte | Meaning |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | `$02` | PEA in emulation did not leave S at $01FE |
| 2 | `$04` | PEA wrongly wrapped into page 1 and clobbered $01FF |
| 3 | `$06` | PEA high byte not written to $0100 |
| 4 | `$08` | PEA low byte not written to $00FF (it must escape page 1) |

### A3.03 — PLD escapes, PLY not

Provenance: **Documented** (WDC datasheet; superfamicom.org escape list). Kind: scored.

| Code | Byte | Meaning |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | `$02` | PLD did not pull from $0200/$0201 (it must escape page 1) |
| 2 | `$04` | PLY escaped page 1 (old instructions must wrap to $0100) |

### A3.04 — d,S escapes page 1

Provenance: **Documented** (WDC datasheet; hardware-confirmed per superfamicom.org). Kind: scored.

| Code | Byte | Meaning |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | `$02` | d,S wrapped inside page 1 (it must escape) |

### A3.05 — Stack in bank $00

Provenance: **Documented** (WDC datasheet). Kind: scored.

| Code | Byte | Meaning |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | `$02` | native stack did not wrap to $FFFF within bank $00 |
| 2 | `$04` | push at S=$0000 did not land at $00:0000 |

### A4.01 — JMP (a) no page bug

Provenance: **Documented** (WDC datasheet; SNESdev Errata). Kind: scored.

No failure codes (control-flow test: reaching the end is the pass).

Provenance: **Documented** (SNESdev Errata, 65C816 section). Kind: scored.

No failure codes (control-flow test: reaching the end is the pass).
